scripts.build:chrome: TARGET=chrome vite build --mode development && TARGET=chrome BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --mode development && cd dist/chrome && zip -r ../damn-center-chrome-v1.0.4.zip .
scripts.build:firefox: TARGET=firefox vite build --mode development && TARGET=firefox BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --mode development && cd dist/firefox && zip -r ../damn-center-firefox-v1.0.4.zip .
scripts.build:safari: TARGET=safari vite build --mode development && TARGET=safari BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --mode development && cd dist/safari && zip -r ../damn-center-safari-v1.0.4.zip .
scripts.build: tsc && pnpm run build:chrome && pnpm run build:firefox && pnpm run build:safari && pnpm run zip-source-code
scripts.build:chrome:release: TARGET=chrome vite build --mode production && TARGET=chrome BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --mode production && cd dist/chrome && zip -r ../damn-center-chrome-v1.0.4.zip .
scripts.build:firefox:release: TARGET=firefox vite build --mode production && TARGET=firefox BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --mode production && cd dist/firefox && zip -r ../damn-center-firefox-v1.0.4.zip .
scripts.build:safari:release: TARGET=safari vite build --mode production && TARGET=safari BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --mode production && cd dist/safari && zip -r ../damn-center-safari-v1.0.4.zip .
scripts.build:release: tsc && pnpm run build:chrome:release && pnpm run build:firefox:release && pnpm run build:safari:release && pnpm run zip-source-code
